title: Milestones
writer: Arnold Bennett, Edward Knoblock, Louis Sherwin

plot: 1860 ushers in the era of iron ships, Richard Sibley, a builder of wooden ships, stubbornly resists the change, which leads him to forbid the marriage of his daughter Rose to John Rhead, a proponent of the new method. This injusti...
